title: The Mire Beacon
announcement: Fisherfolk swear a cold green light wanders the wilds at dusk.

mire_stalker.name: Mire Stalker
mire_stalker.description: A stooped, dripping shape that hunts by stolen lantern-light.

beacon_lantern.name: Beacon Lantern
beacon_lantern.description: A storm-lantern of green glass, still warm to the touch.

q_mire_beacon.title: The Mire Beacon
q_mire_beacon.description: Something out in the wilds carries a stolen lantern. Put the light out before it draws worse things to the road.

args.text: The marsh-light was seen again last night — closer to the road this time.
